title: schedonorus elatior
intro: Schedonorus elatior, also known as timothy grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Schedonorus elatior include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Schedonorus elatior include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
